---
name: create-instructions
#description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: Instructions Generator
---

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md file name is provided, use that as the file name, otherwise generate an appropriate file name based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are clear, concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
